title: Discover the vibrant arts and culture of George, Western Cape!
description: TOURISM NEWS AND VIDEO - George offers a...
bodyText:
Video

TOURISM NEWS AND VIDEO - George offers a rich blend of art, history, and culture.


> Art lovers can explore local galleries showcasing works inspired by the stunning landscapes or enjoy walking tours highlighting public art installations and murals.


Cultural tours reveal the town’s colonial and indigenous history, with landmarks like the George Cathedral and beautifully preserved Dutch and British architecture.

The town also hosts festivals celebrating music, art, food, and crafts, providing a chance to engage with local traditions.

VIDEO: Supplied, George Municipality

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
